name: explicit-writing-plans
description: Checks that explicit implementation-plan requests surface und-writing-plans before action.

turns.prompt: A confirmed design already exists for a multi-step development task. Do not run shell commands or edit files. I explicitly want you to use und-writing-plans before any implementation planning or coding. First tell me which skills you will use or skip, in what order, and whether you will create, reuse, or skip a session.
